title: Add SATCOM CoNews ownership board cards
acceptance_criteria: Board shows eight rollout sites with thumbnail, status, owner, next action, and blocker.

title: Create town rollout data source
acceptance_criteria: Town data includes canonical host, phase, editorial lead, Shop Local focus, and deploy readiness.

title: Add Shop Local directory schema export
acceptance_criteria: CSV/JSON schema covers required listing fields, tier, verification status, and sponsor tracking slug.

title: Create SEO pillar template pack
acceptance_criteria: Templates cover gov, schools, shop, events, features, giving, and LTO with title/meta/schema rules.

title: Add contributor onboarding CTA pattern
acceptance_criteria: Upload CTA appears at top of relevant contributor pages and routes to reviewed onboarding path.

title: Create advertiser campaign kit page
acceptance_criteria: Advertiser kit explains tiers, creative specs, CTA, and reporting promise without exposing secrets.

title: Prototype weekly edition payload
acceptance_criteria: Static/sample payload can render one Morrison/Red Rocks weekly edition without sending live email.

title: Add progress monitor card to SATCOM
acceptance_criteria: SATCOM links to progress log, latest packet, and blocker status.
